problem.title: Range Addition
problem.description: Assume you have an array of length n initialized with all 0's and are given k update operations.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – Prefix Sum
solutions.description: Apply each range update as a difference-array operation: add the increment at the start index and subtract it one position past the end index. A single prefix-sum pass at the end propagates these boundary markers into the correct cumulative values across every position.
